examples: Modified radical mastectomy replaces radical mastectomy for breast cancer.
Breast cancer; Pathological type; Modified radical mastectomy; Breast conserving surgery.
I wanted to write this to tell other women that the decision to have a mastectomy was not easy.
But studies have shown that women who undergo immediate reconstruction following a mastectomy benefit psychologically.
Importantly, abortion and addiction and HIV-AIDS and love are different issues from preventative mastectomy.
